title: Portal Creation
wikitext:
[[File:PortalCreation.gif|thumb|400px|[[Chell (Portal)|Chell]] creating Portals with the Portal Gun.]]

==Summary==
'''Portal Creation''' is the ability to generate and travel through rifts of space and time in order to quickly travel between two places. This power is primarily travel-oriented, allowing users to close distances easily or catch an opponent off guard, but more creative and powerful users can redirect their attacks to strike a target they missed or to hit them multiple times, [[Attack Reflection|redirect their attacks back at them]], or forcibly displace an opponent to provide an advantage or [[BFR|remove them from the battlefield entirely]].

==Users==
*[[Chell (Portal)|Chell]] ([[Half-Life|Portal]])
*[[Xemnas|Mem]][[Roxas|bers]] [[Vexen|of]] [[Axel (Kingdom Hearts)|Organization]] [[Marluxia|XIII]], particularly [[Xigbar]] ([[Kingdom Hearts]])
*[[Bermuda von Veckenschtein]] ([[Katekyo Hitman Reborn]])
*[[The Shrike]] ([[Hyperion Cantos]])
